name: Sweet Little Things
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except the rolls in a bowl.
2. Separate the rolls and roll them out thinner, like pie crust.
3. Place about 2 to 3 tablespoons filling in the middle of the long edge.
4. Fold the corners up and roll up the remaining flap.
5. Bake at 350°F until brown, approximately 10-12 minutes.
6. These are quick, easy, and great for unexpected company. They look better if you use clear vanilla extract.
